g.aria-label: Structured error handling with typed errors and Result patterns
g.title: Structured error handling with typed errors and Result patterns

g.aria-label:
## Error Handling
- Always use typed errors extending a base AppError class - Never catch and swallow errors silently - Use Result<T, E> pattern for expected failures - Reserve try/catch for truly unexpected exceptions - Include context in error messages - Log errors with structured data
g.title:
## Error Handling
- Always use typed errors extending a base AppError class - Never catch and swallow errors silently - Use Result<T, E> pattern for expected failures - Reserve try/catch for truly unexpected exceptions - Include context in error messages - Log errors with structured data
